source: CAS Academic Policies §Academic Program (line 500 — full-time status + credit-limit paragraph)
body:
**Yes, with adviser approval. CAS allows registering for more than 18 credits per term ONLY with the approval and clearance of your academic adviser.**

From the CAS bulletin (line 500): *"Students may register for more than 18 credits per term with the approval and clearance of their academic adviser."*

A full-time schedule is 16 credits/term (32/year, 128 over four years). Minimum full-time is 12 credits/term — falling below 24/year jeopardizes full-time status; falling below 32/year may affect financial aid.

To request an overload, contact the College Advising Center (25 West 4th Street, 5th floor; 212-998-8130).
